project_type: Next.js 16 admin dashboard with React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, shadcn/ui (Radix), Prisma ORM
build_system: Next.js with @tailwindcss/postcss v4 - uses @import 'tailwindcss' in globals.css, no tailwind.config.js (Tailwind v4 uses CSS-based config via @theme inline)
test_framework: No test framework configured - only lint via next lint
verification_instructions: Run npm run build to verify TypeScript compilation and Next.js build succeeds. Run npm run lint for code quality.
environment_constraints: Check network mode. Next.js fonts from Google Fonts require network access during build. Tailwind v4 uses CSS-native configuration (no tailwind.config.js).
contribution_requirements: Indonesian UI labels. Follow shadcn/ui patterns for components. Use @/lib/utils cn() for class merging.
key_patterns: shadcn/ui CVA-based components in src/components/ui/. Root layout in src/app/layout.tsx uses next/font/google. Dashboard layout is client component with Sheet for mobile nav. Dashboard page is server component with Prisma queries. CSS variables defined in globals.css using oklch color space under @theme inline block.
directory_structure: src/app/(dashboard)/ - dashboard route group with layout and pages. src/components/ui/ - shadcn components. src/lib/ - utilities and prisma client. prisma/ - schema and seed.
